About Me
Who I Am

I'm an ambitious IT graduate with completed qualifications in System Support, System Development, and End-User Computing from Eyethu National Computer College.

I bring hands-on training in hardware and software troubleshooting, end-user support, and web fundamentals. I'm proactive, detail-oriented, and thrive in environments where I can solve real problems and learn fast.

My goal is to join a forward-thinking organisation where I can apply my technical skills, grow professionally, and deliver real value from day one.

What I've Done
Experience

IT Support & Web Development Trainee

Eyethu National Computer College
